# Dayan AI Workshop

> Open workshop for building reliable AI agent workflows.

Core pages:

- README: ./README.md
- Manifesto: ./MANIFESTO.md
- Quickstart: ./docs/quickstart/build-a-reliable-ai-worker-in-30-min.md
- Workshop map: ./docs/maps/dayan-workshop-map.md
- AI worker mission card: ./examples/ai-worker-mission-card.md
- Open source boundary: ./docs/about/open-source-boundary.md
- AI workflow governance: ./docs/glossary/ai-workflow-governance.md
- Verifier: ./docs/glossary/verifier.md
- Skills / hooks / verifiers pattern: ./docs/patterns/skills-hooks-verifiers.md
- Permission redline library: ./templates/permission-redline-library.md
- AI employee reliability checkup: ./templates/ai-employee-reliability-checkup.md
- Claude Code vs Codex: ./docs/compare/claude-code-vs-codex.md

Public boundary:

This repo contains public-safe methods and templates. It does not contain private customer data, credentials, personal memory, or machine-specific operating records.
